channel.title: Rant on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Rant on Zymacs

item.title: A Brief Non-Tech Tour Around My System
item.description:
I use Linux. Arch Linux. And for a window manager, I use i3.

The Peace …

I have intentionally chosen to leave the installation mostly bare. There’s no service to handle notifications. The wallpaper is non existent. No lock screen. There is no File Manager. The core utils are a more than sufficient replacement. Its mostly all configs and terminal commands.

There’s mostly not a lot of clicking and dragging. Maybe except for a few instances when using my browser. I actually wish there was none. That tends to kill flow. If you use the terminal for long you’d relate to the reluctance to do any operation that’ll take your hands away from your keyboard.
